title: Kanmani Anbudan
description: Anbu plans a private meeting with Kanmani through a secret note. Unexpectedly, Aparna's arrival leaves Kanmani shocked by what she witnesses.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Paraman suspects Kalamma's role in Ashok's murder and devises a plan to uncover the truth. Hiding his emotions, he harshly blames Ilamathi to keep Kalamma convinced.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Fearing his secret will be exposed, Karna interrupts Vetri and Divya's discussion about Manickam. Meanwhile, Shanmugam is upset by the news of Diya's major operation.

title: Thaai Maaman
description: Pechi is deeply moved as Manjamalai sincerely apologises for mistreating her. Mayandi and his family are stunned by complications in Poongodi and Azhagar's horoscope match.

title: Sindhu Bairavi
description: Gayathri and Chezhiyan's engagement takes place with everyone's blessings. A shocking revelation by Sanjay about Arumugam's role in the crop damage leaves Bhairavi stunned.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
description: Furious after Mathi rejects his attempt to get closer, Suresh forcibly approaches Mathi despite her resistance. Then, he shouts angrily and reveals their conflict to the family.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: As Muthuvel's cancer comes to light, Sakthivel orders Kathir to stay away from him. Later, Raji recognises Kathir's selfless sacrifice and embraces him.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
description: Chandayatha's father confronts Cheran for secretly meeting Chandayatha and refuses to marry her to him. Meanwhile, Manohar meets Nila and learns about her conflict with Nadesan.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
description: Taking an emotional step, Rohini brings Divya along for support to sign the divorce papers. She then reaches Vijaya's house, facing the painful end of her married life.

title: Chinna Marumagal
description: Eshwari secretly takes Azhagar from Tamizhselvi's house by deceiving Dhanam. Tamizhselvi is furious after discovering through Eshwari's letter that Azhagar has been taken away.

title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
description: Kamala halts Swetha's wedding upon learning Rajesh is mentally ill. Guilty over his wrong choice, Karikalan desperately decides to get Swetha married to one of his sons.

title: Onna Irukka Kaththukanum
description: Lakshmi tears up the prospective bride's photo, rejecting her relatives' proposal for Murugan. She then confronts Kandhasamy over the delay in finding him a suitable bride.
